name: Kimi CLI

form_factor.comment: CLI + VS Code + Zed + JetBrains via ACP.

released_in.comment: First public release v0.34 on 2025-10-21. Reached v1.0 on 2026-01-27. Latest: v1.44.0 (2026-05-14).

latest_major_update.comment: v1.44.0 (2026-05-14). Very active development: 97 releases in ~7 months. Rapid iteration pace.

rules.comment: Full AGENTS.md support. Hierarchical loading from git root to working dir, including .kimi/AGENTS.md at each level (32 KiB budget). /init command auto-generates AGENTS.md.

skills.comment: Full Agent Skills format (SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter). Four-tier auto-discovery. Cross-compatible with Claude/Codex skill dirs. Flow skills with Mermaid/D2 flowcharts.

hooks.comment: Supported (Beta). 13 lifecycle events: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, SessionEnd, SubagentStart/Stop, PreCompact, PostCompact, Notification. Shell commands via stdin.

mcp_servers.comment: Full MCP support. Transport: streamable HTTP, stdio, OAuth. kimi mcp add/list/test/remove/auth commands. Config in ~/.kimi/mcp.json.

custom_commands.comment: Custom plugins (Beta) via plugin.json with executable scripts. Slash commands (/skill:, /flow:) serve as custom invocation. No arbitrary custom aliases in config.

subagents.comment: Full subagent support. Built-in types: coder, explore, plan. YAML agent files with inheritance. Agent tool with subagent_type, model, resume, run_in_background params.

model_selection.comment: Full model selection. Provider types: kimi, openai_legacy, openai_responses, anthropic, gemini, vertexai. /model interactive picker. CLI flags: --model, --thinking.

approval_mode.comment: Full system: Normal (approval with diff preview), YOLO mode (--yolo, auto-approves all), AFK mode (--afk, auto-approves and dismisses questions). Status bar badges.

sandbox_mode.comment: No dedicated sandbox/mode. Has workspace scope boundaries, file operation approval, sensitive file protection (.env, SSH keys). No containerized isolation.

resume.comment: Full session resume. --session/--resume/-S/-r with optional session ID. Interactive picker. Auto-restores approval decisions, plan mode, subagent instances.

continue.comment: kimi --continue/-C resumes most recent session in current working directory. /new for fresh session. /sessions lists and switches between sessions.

non_interactive.comment: --print flag for print mode: auto-exit after prompt, implicit auto-approval (AFK behavior), text stdout. --quiet shorthand. Exit codes: 0=success, 1=error, 75=retryable.

output_format.comment: --input-format: text or stream-json (JSONL). --output-format: text or stream-json (JSONL). --final-message-only flag. --quiet shorthand. Unified Message format for JSON I/O.

statusline.comment: Full status bar in shell mode: context usage %, mode indicators, YOLO/AFK badges, plan mode badge, background task counts, provider display name.

telemetry.comment: No explicit telemetry documentation found. Has automatic update checks (disable via KIMI_CLI_NO_AUTO_UPDATE), but no stated telemetry/analytics collection policy.

custom_model_provider.comment: Full custom provider support. providers table in config.toml with type, base_url, api_key, custom_headers. Six provider types including OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, Gemini.

notes: Kimi CLI by Moonshot AI (Beijing) is an Apache-2.0 open-source coding agent with rapid development pace (97 releases in 7 months). Strong AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, subagent, and YOLO/AFK approval mode support. Notable for status bar with badges and comprehensive JSON streaming output.

pricing.comment: Kimi Code platform via membership subscription (credits-based, 7-day refresh cycle) or pay-as-you-go via api.moonshot.cn. Also supports own API key from OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini.

hosted_agent.comment: Local CLI tool backed by Moonshot API.
